programme.title: Lone Star Law

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier

programme.title: Richard E. Grant's 7 Deadly Sins

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson meets an outdoor cat named Henery, who having been forced to live inside, has protested by soaking the place in pee.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri attends the exam of Charlie the tiger to see if his tumours were successfully treated. And, Bindi helps develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Game Warden. The Texas Game Wardens are called when a nuisance alligator gets too close for comfort. Later, a suburban squirrel hunter is caught trespassing.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff attends a shelter to help the pets of disadvantaged and homeless owners. And, at the clinic, Max the dog needs treatment for a growth on his head.

programme.desc: The vets treat Xena, a German shepherd with head injuries after being trampled by a donkey. And, Coco the kitten is having trouble walking.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Two stray pit bulls hiding beneath a two-ton stack of lumber lure Tia into a dramatic and potentially deadly rescue. Then a colourful Bayou couple visit Villalobos.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson works with Sydney, a Bengal, who keeps spraying on every piece of furniture in the house. Plus, energetic cat Stella threatens to harm a toddler.

programme.desc: Jackson works with a mother daughter duo whose lovable cats are having a territorial spraying match. Plus, he meets with troublemaking cat Bowie who's on his last chance.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The team works its magic on a photo booth and constructs an underwater wonderland in a wing of an Ohio children's hospital.

programme.title: Tanked

programme.title: Tanked

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.desc: A massive prehistoric, crocodilian creature known as the Gbahali kills people in Liberia; it may simply be a case of mistaken identity; it could be a super-sized species of crocodile more akin to a dinosaur than anything known today.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Staff members devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk; a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: The last polar bear in New York City shows his age, so staff make sure he gets the attention he needs; a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their big debut; a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo

programme.title: The Zoo

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: Cops investigate the apparent carjacking of a husband and wife in East Los Angeles, California only to discover that the ambush was a ruse, carried out by cousins, to kill the husband for insurance money.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: When a chef's wife goes missing from Southern California, it initially appears she may have left voluntarily, yet, after months of investigation, detectives uncover she was the victim of a ruthless homicide and an even more savage cover up.
